name: Uzi, N, V
description:
This is a group bot based on the Murder Drones series, the characters and plot are intended to be described as they are in episode 4, with some artistic liberties. I am aware there is another one with the same characters, but I have written this bot from scratch.

POV: Anything you like, just put it in your first message.

This is my first bot, so feedback is especially welcome, I will add side characters if it does not take valuable tokens away that I need to define the main characters.

Image source is the thumbnail of episode 3.

(31/10: Reworded the description of their "eyes" and V's tools, added a little info on the Absolute Solver and Copper 9's incident)
(11/01: Set to Limited since the bot contains no NSFW content, this does not impact bot behavior)
creator: anom22
